stereotype: «ResourceAccess» — owns operatedRuntime (declarative-desired-state runtime infrastructure; GitOps repo + ArgoCD + Argo Rollouts + Prometheus)
volatility: OperatedRuntime volatility (three faces): (1) convergence mechanism (GitOps/ArgoCD today; aiarch publishes, infrastructure reconciles); (2) compute-cost attribution (metering source); (3) runtime-status transport (health/SLO/capacity surfacing). ArtifactTarget (which git repo holds manifests) is an independent volatility also absorbed (Amendment 2026-05-30).

outbound.name: operatedRuntime
outbound.how: direct, by value — plain Go methods; Activity-wrapped by calling Managers; writes = git commit+push to deterministic manifest path; reads = observability stack pull

ops.signature: publishDesiredState(appId: AppId, desiredState: DesiredState, idempotencyKey: fwra.IdempotencyKey) → void
ops.note: Commits the rendered infrastructure-neutral desired state to the deterministic manifest path; returns at durable acceptance (not at convergence); absorbs deploy, autoscale-republish, idle-pause, delinquency-patch, and payment-config-patch (wirePaymentConfig fold)

fields.name: appId
fields.note: logical identity of the operated app; maps to namespace/manifest path inside this seam; never a namespace or path on the contract

fields.name: desiredState
fields.note: infrastructure-neutral desired-state declaration rendered by the Manager; Bytes are opaque at the contract boundary; absorbs all desired-state shapes (deploy bundle, autoscaler revision, idle-pause patch, delinquency patch, payment-config patch)

fields.name: idempotencyKey
fields.note: caller-supplied key placed into git commit message; Manager derives from ${workflowId}:${activityId}; deterministic manifest path makes identical content naturally idempotent

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error; Transient/Conflict/Infrastructure = retryable; Auth/ContractMisuse = terminal

ops.note: Removes the app's desired-state declaration from the manifests repo; ArgoCD prunes resources asynchronously; NotFound mapped to success (already-gone == withdrawn)

fields.name: appId
fields.note: logical identity of the operated app to withdraw

fields.name: idempotencyKey
fields.note: caller-supplied key placed into git commit message; NotFound on withdraw is mapped to success inside this seam

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error; NotFound mapped to SUCCESS (already-gone == withdrawn)

ops.note: Batched point-in-time health + SLO observation for all in-flight apps on a reconcile tick; collapses getApplicationHealth + getSloStatus (same tick, same decision); no side effect

fields.name: appIds
fields.note: the in-flight operated apps the reconcile tick is observing; batched to avoid N round-trips per tick

fields.name: (map entry)
fields.note: per-app point-in-time health + SLO snapshot: Phase RuntimePhase, Healthy bool, SloMet bool, SloDetail string, ObservedAt time.Time, Budget *SloBudget (optional, D-OR-Δ1 enrichment)

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error; NotFound per-app surfaces as absent map entry or StatusUnknown, not whole-call error

ops.note: Reads per-app infrastructure-neutral compute consumption over a window; returns ComputeUnits + opaque RawMeter; returned not recorded (Manager forwards to usageAccess)

fields.name: appIds
fields.note: operated apps to attribute consumption for

fields.name: window
fields.note: closed time range to attribute over; {From time.Time; To time.Time}; reconcile tick interval for Path B; cycle window for settlement close

fields.name: (map entry)
fields.note: per-app consumption: ComputeUnits float64 (normalized provider-neutral units); RawMeter []byte (optional provider-opaque meter blob); no vCPU/GiB/SKU/price

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error; NotFound per-app surfaces as absent map entry, not whole-call error

dataContracts: AppId = string // logical operated-app identity; maps to namespace/manifest path inside this seam
DesiredState = struct{ Bytes []byte; ContentType string } // infrastructure-neutral desired-state declaration; opaque at contract boundary
RuntimeStatus = struct{ Phase RuntimePhase; Healthy bool; SloMet bool; SloDetail string; ObservedAt time.Time; Budget *SloBudget } // Budget nil until D-OR-Δ1 enrichment
RuntimePhase = int // StatusUnknown | StatusPending | StatusRunning | StatusDegraded | StatusPaused | StatusWithdrawn
AttributionWindow = struct{ From time.Time; To time.Time }
ComputeAttribution = struct{ ComputeUnits float64; RawMeter []byte } // normalized provider-neutral units; no vCPU/GiB/SKU/price
SloBudget = struct{ RemainingPct float64; Window string; Burndown []float64 } // PROPOSED delta D-OR-Δ1; off v1-demo critical path
errorModel: fwra.Error (framework-go/resourceaccess.Error); Retryable seeded from Kind. RETRYABLE: Transient, Conflict (concurrent desired-state write), Infrastructure. TERMINAL: Auth (infrastructure token expired), NotFound (unknown appId on read; on withdraw mapped to SUCCESS), ContractMisuse (empty appId/key, malformed window).
idempotency: Writes: deterministic manifest paths (identical content = no new revision) + caller-supplied fwra.IdempotencyKey in the commit message (Manager derives from ${workflowId}:${activityId}). Reads: pure; no idempotency key.

revisions.summary: Initial contract: 4 ops (publishDesiredState, withdraw, readRuntimeStatus, readComputeAttribution); wirePaymentConfig folded into publishDesiredState; getApplicationHealth+getSloStatus collapsed into readRuntimeStatus; infrastructure-drives-convergence doctrine; two operational callers (operationsManager, settlementManager)

APPROVED-AND-FROZEN. 9/9 PASS (0 waived). Factoring confirmed sound. Q3 settlement-compute-source inconsistency escalated to system-architect (non-blocking); DSL authoritative (settlement reads usageAccess not operatedRuntimeAccess). Q1/Q2/Q4/Q5/Q6 confirmed.

Additive amendment: manifests git target is profile-selected (cloud=Gitea, local=on-disk, enterprise=customer repo). Contract surface unchanged; §6/§9 infrastructure mapping gains local-git instance note. Senior-frozen surface (2026-05-28) stands.

PROPOSED contract delta (off v1-demo critical path): additive optional RuntimeStatus.Budget *SloBudget field (Option A adopted; Option B fifth-op rejected). Driven by ux-mock operations.ts §1 burndown surface. Status/Health renders from boolean SloMet for parity demo; burndown lights up when Budget populated.
